title: Spicy Fermented Fil Delight
description: A fusion of spicy and fermented flavors with tender fil, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: fil
ingredients.notes: firm tofu, drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together fermented sauce, hot sauce, and coriander.
Coat the fil cubes evenly with the spicy mixture.
Roll the coated fil cubes in the crushed peanuts or chopped nuts to coat.
Place the coated fil cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the fil is golden brown and crispy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
